classifications.subject: [AINews] OpenAI GPT-next disproves 80 year old Erdős planar unit distance problem for under $1000

key_items.title: OpenAI Math Breakthrough: Erdős Unit Distance Problem
key_items.description: GPT-5.6/next disproves 80-year-old Erdős conjecture for under $1000 in compute. 125 pages of reasoning, verified by Timothy Gowers as first clear example of AI solving a well-known open math problem.

key_items.title: InferenceBench: Agent R&D Automation Benchmark
key_items.description: New benchmark for AI R&D automation agents. Frontier agents struggle with system-level engineering, inverse scaling observed (smaller models more robust).

key_items.title: MINTEval: Long-Context Memory Systems Benchmark
key_items.description: Tests memory under 138.8K avg tokens (max 1.8M). Best accuracy only 33.4%. Argues memory should be a dedicated learned subsystem.

key_items.title: Cohere Command A+ Open Release
key_items.description: 218B MoE / 25B active, Apache 2.0. Runs on 2×H100 at W4A4. Intelligence Index 37 (≈Claude 4.5 Haiku).

key_items.title: ThoughtTrace: User Thought Dataset
key_items.description: 10,174 thought annotations across 2,155 conversations. +41.7% for user behavior prediction, +25.6% for alignment.

key_items.title: Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic
key_items.description: Karpathy joins Anthropic's pre-training team under Nick Joseph. Will lead group using Claude to accelerate pre-training research.

key_items.title: Anthropic Financials: $10.9B Q2 Revenue, First Operating Profit
key_items.description: Anthropic projects $10.9B revenue for June quarter. Will pay $1.25B/month for compute. Valuation may surpass OpenAI.

key_items.title: Google Gemini Spark & Antigravity
key_items.description: Gemini Spark: 24/7 personal agent across Workspace. Antigravity: desktop app/CLI agent/SDK/VS Code fork, now a Codex clone.

key_items.title: Figma Design Agent
key_items.description: Design agent inside canvas: generates multiple directions in parallel, uses design system, collaborates in-file.

key_items.title: Active Graph: Long-Running Agent Framework
key_items.description: Open-source framework for long-running agents: remembers events, reacts to new ones, compares runs.

key_items.title: Factory's Droid: Deferred Context Engine
key_items.description: Reduces context size by 40% by loading tools more selectively in AI agents.

key_items.title: VS Code Extension Compromise: 3,800 GitHub Repos Exfiltrated
key_items.description: Poisoned third-party VS Code extension compromised GitHub employee device, exfiltrated ~3,800 internal repos.

classifications.subject: OpenAI's Math Breakthrough Opens a New Era

key_items.title: OpenAI Math Breakthrough Coverage
key_items.description: Beehiiv-sourced coverage of OpenAI's math breakthrough. Likely overlaps with AINews coverage. Links are beehiiv tracking URLs.

classifications.note: Beehiiv tracking URLs; all 20 links are tracking redirects. Content likely overlaps with uid=120 (swyx AINews). Deprioritize unless unique angle found.

key_items.title: Hidden Technical Debt of AI Systems: Agent Runtime
key_items.description: Article on agent runtime technical debt in AI systems.

key_items.title: How to Correctly Use MCP Servers with AI Agents
key_items.description: Guide on proper MCP server integration patterns with AI agents.

key_items.title: Google Research: Empirical Research Assistance (ERA)
key_items.description: Four ways Google Research scientists use ERA for empirical research.

key_items.title: DeepSeek V4 Compressed Attention: KV-Cache to 2%
key_items.description: DeepSeek V4 achieves extreme KV-cache compression down to 2%.

key_items.title: Breaking Opus 4.7 with ChatGPT (Hacking Claude's Memory)
key_items.description: Project demonstrating Claude memory exploitation via ChatGPT.

key_items.title: Agent Skills for Google Products
key_items.description: Tool for agent skills targeting Google products and technologies.

classifications.subject: You'll lose your job in 2027.

key_items.title: AI Job Displacement Prediction
key_items.description: Elena Verna's opinion piece predicting AI-driven job losses by 2027. Growth/product leadership perspective.

classifications.note: Opinion/speculation piece, tangentially relevant. Low priority for wiki ingestion.

classifications.subject: Giving Agents Computers — Ivan Burazin, Daytona

key_items.title: Daytona: Composable Computers for AI Agents
key_items.description: Daytona provides sandbox/computer-use infrastructure for AI agents via API. 74% MoM growth, 850K sandboxes/day by single customer, 60ms spin-up, 50K concurrent in 75s.

key_items.title: RL Workloads Now 50% of Daytona Usage
key_items.description: RL/eval workloads surged from zero to 50% of usage in months. Square-wave pattern: zero to 100K CPUs instantly. Replacing Kubernetes for RL.

key_items.title: Agent-First Versioning Pattern
key_items.description: Customers dump entire codebase as JSON snapshot to S3 per time sequence - no diffs needed when fast enough.

key_items.title: CI Bottleneck from Agent PRs
key_items.description: Companies generating 1000+ PRs/day from AI agents, causing CI queue congestion.

key_items.title: Future AI-Native Cloud Vision
key_items.description: Ivan Burazin predicts purpose-built cloud for agents: sandboxes, web search, databases. Not the end of agent infra primitives.

classifications.subject: EDA Market Primer

key_items.title: EDA Market Analysis
key_items.description: Electronic Design Automation market primer. Synopsys/Cadence/Siemens control 85%+. $16B market growing 13% CAGR. Tangential to AI/LLM topics.

classifications.note: Not directly relevant to LLM/AI Agent wiki. Semiconductor infrastructure background material. Skip unless cross-referencing AI chip design.

classifications.subject: [AINews] New AI Infra unicorns: Exa, Modal, TurboPuffer

key_items.title: Exa: $250M at $2.2B Series C
key_items.description: AI search company reaching unicorn status.

key_items.title: Modal: $355M at $4.7B Series C
key_items.description: Serverless GPU cloud rebuilding cloud stack for AI workloads.

key_items.title: TurboPuffer: $100M ARR Profitable on <$1M Raised
key_items.description: Context retrieval infrastructure company achieving extraordinary capital efficiency.

key_items.title: Agent Harnesses Driving Gains (physics-intern, mini-swe-agent)
key_items.description: physics-intern boosts Gemini 3.1 Pro from 17.7→31.4 on benchmarks. mini-swe-agent on ProgramBench.

key_items.title: Agent Design Maturation Patterns
key_items.description: Start single-agent; adopt manager/sub-agent topology only when tool sprawl/prompt bloat unmanageable.

key_items.title: Weaviate Built-in MCP Server
key_items.description: Vector DB with built-in MCP server enables coding agents to use hybrid BM25+vector retrieval on repos.

key_items.title: LangChain: Sandbox Auth Proxy + Typed Streaming Protocol
key_items.description: Agent-world boundaries via sandbox auth proxy. Typed streaming for tools, subagents, media, interrupts.

key_items.title: vLLM Elastic Expert Parallelism
key_items.description: Live resizing of MoE DP/EP topology without restarts via GPU-to-GPU transfers over NVLink/RDMA.

key_items.title: Codex Appshots & Remote Computer Use
key_items.description: Capture screenshot+text from Mac apps. Securely use Mac apps from phone even when Mac is locked.

key_items.title: RAEv2: Faster Representation Autoencoders
key_items.description: 10x faster convergence. Summing last K encoder layers improves reconstruction+generation without added inference cost.

classifications.subject: Datasette Agent: an AI assistant for Datasette built on LLM

key_items.title: Datasette Agent: AI Assistant for Datasette
key_items.description: Simon Willison's new extensible AI agent framework for Datasette, built on LLM library. Plugin ecosystem: charts (Observable Plot), image gen (ChatGPT 2.0), code sandbox (Fly Sprites).

key_items.title: Local Model Support: Gemma-4-26b-a4b via LM Studio
key_items.description: Datasette Agent works with open-weight models on local hardware. One-liner setup with LM Studio. Reliable tool calls and SQLite generation.

key_items.title: LLM Library v0.32a0 Refactoring
key_items.description: Extracting LLM agent abstractions from Datasette Agent into the core LLM Python library.

key_items.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash Details & Pricing
key_items.description: 1M context, 65K output tokens. $1.50/$9.00 per 1M input/output. #1 on APEX-Agents-AA. No computer-use capability. Knowledge cutoff: Jan 2025.

key_items.title: Google Gemini Spark Personal Agent
key_items.description: 24/7 personal agent connecting to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Slides, YouTube, Maps. Secure runtime with ephemeral VMs per task, DLP enforcement.

key_items.title: Antigravity CLI Replaces Gemini CLI
key_items.description: Antigravity: desktop app, CLI agent, SDK, VS Code fork. Old Gemini CLI (Apache 2.0) stops working June 18, 2026.
